name: code-index-agent
description: Local code graph, MCP retrieval, and browser task control for coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: Graph-aware repo memory and task supervision for coding agents.
interface.longDescription: Code Index Agent packages the code_index CLI, MCP server, and live graph control plane so Claude, Codex, and other MCP-capable agents can search symbols, inspect impact, submit tasks, watch active files, and cancel local command runs from the browser.
defaultPrompt: Find the files and symbols involved in this change.
Start the live graph and supervise this task.
Show impact and affected tests before editing.
